task: qr_v2 batched compact-Householder QR (GPU MODE leaderboard 774)
eval: qr_challenge/run_local.py (reproduces frozen reference.py gate + eval.py geomean)
objective: minimize benchmark geomean (us) subject to 22/22 test gate PASS
noise_note: timing metric; eval early-stops at err/mean<0.001; treat <~2% geomean change as noise. Local screen aborts a candidate if any benchmark case 1-shot estimate > 8000us.
toolchain: box has triton 3.7 (JIT ok) but NO nvcc/ninja -> no CUDA load_inline; use Triton + torch.bmm (cuBLAS tensor cores).
dispatch_plan: n<=128: fused Triton (qr_hh_fused, RUN2, win). n>=176: blocked Householder + tensor-core bmm trailing (RUN3, TODO). Shape-based dispatch by n only (NOT conditioning).
tried_ideas: RUN1: batched unblocked Householder (rank-1 bmm) -- DISCARD launch-bound+HBM-bound (b00 0.03x, b03 2.93x/320ms, b04 0.62x)
RUN2: fused Triton 1-program/matrix -- KEEP small-n path (n<=128 win, b00 7.6x); spills n>=176
